biological_replicate: cells that were unperturbed, elongation arrested with high-dose emetine, or treated with low-dose emetine
technical_replicate: technical replicates performed on two different sets of primers targeting the same transcript
experimental_design: treatment comparison (unperturbed, high-dose emetine, low-dose emetine)
The poly-ribosome fractions were isolated from cells that were unperturbed...
factor_value: elongation arrested with high-dose emetine, or treated with low-dose emetine
number_of_fractions: Eleven consecutive fractions, 20 μl each, were collected manually from the top of the gradient.
number_of_technical_replicates: each containing three technical replicates performed on two different sets of primers targeting the same transcript.
number_of_biological_replicates: cells that were unperturbed, elongation arrested with high-dose emetine, or treated with low-dose emetine
